problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
